description: Document requirement rules matrix: maps zones + overlays to required documents under RMA Schedule 4 and Building Code

baseline_documents.reason: RMA Schedule 4: Site plan showing north arrow, scale, and property boundary (required for all resource consents)
RMA Schedule 4: Plans and elevations at 1:100 minimum showing dimensions, levels, and finishes
RMA Schedule 4: AEE assessing actual or potential environmental effects (scope varies by zone and use)

documents.reason: Medium density zones require traffic impact assessment
High density zones require detailed traffic impact assessment
Commercial zones require transport and parking assessment
Commercial zones must demonstrate adequate parking and loading
City centre zone requires transport assessment
Industrial zones require noise and vibration assessment
Industrial use requires assessment of hazardous materials storage and handling
Heavy industrial requires comprehensive noise assessment
Heavy industrial requires detailed hazmat assessment
Heavy industrial activities may generate air emissions
Liquefaction hazard areas require geotechnical assessment of foundation design and ground improvement
Flood-prone area requires assessment of flood risk and management measures
Building must be set above flood risk level (FRL)
Steep slope areas require geotechnical assessment of slope stability and site suitability
Tsunami-prone coastal areas require risk assessment and evacuation planning considerations
Coastal erosion areas require assessment of long-term building viability
Inundation-prone coastal areas require assessment of flood risk and resilience measures
Works affecting scheduled heritage items require assessment of heritage values and design appropriateness
Character area design must align with heritage values and streetscape characteristics
Buildings in character areas must demonstrate design consistency with existing character
Scheduled trees/vegetation require management plan and arboricultural assessment
Proposed works affecting notable trees require arboricultural report and management plan

combined_requirements_notes.multiple_overlays: Where multiple overlays apply, consolidate assessments where possible (e.g., single geotechnical report addressing both liquefaction and slope hazards)
combined_requirements_notes.zone_and_overlay: Where both zone and overlay requirements apply, the stricter requirement takes precedence
combined_requirements_notes.regional_consent: Some activities may require concurrent regional consent if they involve water use, discharge to water, or other ECan-regulated activities
